sourceMovie.title: Victor Frankenstein
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Victor Frankenstein (2015) as a drama theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The drama and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Monkey Shines
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Victor Frankenstein clicked for you, Monkey Shines (1988) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and science fiction, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Victor Frankenstein?
faq.answer: Try Monkey Shines, Frankenstein, Mary Shelley's Frankenstein—each shares DNA with Victor Frankenstein while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Victor Frankenstein?
faq.answer: Victor Frankenstein (2015) is best described as Drama, Science Fiction, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Victor Frankenstein worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
